metadata_json.revision_goal: Artifacts are present and numeric computations reproduce from the embedded packet. The grader and verifier flagged two practical gaps that reduced the semantic score: (1) per-record estimated_trim_cost_usd values (or a cost workbook) are missing from the deliverables, so the budget justification is not numerically grounded; (2) the photonics_memo.md preview is truncated and the memo does not visibly include the full sensitivity recomputation tables for the +/-5% shift, so verifiers cannot validate the sensitivity claim. Addressing these will restore full semantic confidence.
